prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GOLDS-LARGE-SCOOP-ORNG Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 8.5 Inch Heavy Duty Large Plastic Orange Sand Scooper for Metal Detecting Description: Going treasure hunting? Then you need the ASR Outdoor 8.5" Orange Sand Scooper.

This sand scooper is super lightweight, making it ideal for scooping up sand to shake out treasures on dry, sandy beaches. Since it's constructed of durable plastic, it wont interfere with your metal detector making it easier to find treasure.

Simply use your metal detector to locate the target area, scoop up some sand in the target area and run the metal detector over the scoop. Then, gently shake the scoop side to side, allowing the sand to fall out of the holes and uncover the treasure. Make sure you have one of these before your next treasure hunt. Search Terms: metal detector for kids adult hand trowel gold mining equipment kit tools pan supplies outdoor activities prospecting camping sifting screen Features: - ASR Outdoor Sand Scoop - Orange Color - Length: 8.5" - Built in lanyard hole in handle, made from heavy duty ABS plastic, will not give off any false positive readings from your metal detector - Capacity: 3 Quarts, Hole Size: 0.5 inch, Number of holes: 78 - Ideal for beach combing, metal detector accessory, gold panning, treasure hunting and gardening === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8.5" Orange Heavy Duty Sand Scooper

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8.5 in Orange Sand Scooper

anthropic.title_differentiation: Metal Detector Accessory, 3 Quart Capacity, ABS Plastic, 78 Holes, Gold Panning, Treasure Hunting, Beach Combing

openai.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty ABS Plastic, 78 Drain Holes, 3 Quart Capacity, Lanyard Hole, Beach Combing, Gold Panning, Non-Metallic
